title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services:
Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services!
